title: Soothing Button
description: Adds a button to the title screen with the most soothing physics ever! Also, it adds a border touch counter, just tap on the button to make it jump in any direction! Don't forget about sounds, they're also not less soothing!
body:
A simple mod for fabric, that adds a simple square button with physics on the title screen!
Also, there's a bounce counter, that counts every button bounce of edges, just to make it funnier to play with :)

Also, it's followed by not less soothing sounds!
